description: Use the N/currency module to work with exchange rates within your NetSuite account. You can use this module to find the exchange rate between two currencies based on a certain date. The Multiple Currencies feature must be enabled.

methods.name: exchangeRate
methods.description: Returns an exchange rate between two currencies. The source currency is looked up relative to the target currency on the effective date.

params.name: options.source
params.description: The internal ID or three-letter ISO code for the currency you are converting from (e.g., 1 or USD).

params.name: options.target
params.description: The internal ID or three-letter ISO code for the currency you are converting to.

params.name: options.date
params.description: Pass in a new Date object. If not specified, defaults to today. The date determines the exchange rate in effect.

methods.name: exchangeRate.promise
methods.description: Returns an exchange rate between two currencies asynchronously.

params.name: options
params.description: Same parameters as currency.exchangeRate(options): source, target, date (optional).
